body:
## Changes

- Add support for Requested Reviewers and Drafts
    #123 @DayBySay 
- Add parameter to filter pull requests by branch
   #126 @aaron-foreflight 
- Add support for notifications
   #127 @LucasCoderT 
- Add parameters to fetch releases by tag
   #141 @417-72KI 
- Add support for showing contents of a gists file
  #139 @HassanElDesouky 
- Add support for starring a repository
  #142 @417-72KI 
- Add optional generation of release notes
  #149 @integer256 
- Add support async/await
   #134 #150 @pietbrauer @417-72KI

## Tests
- User docker for Linux Builds
  #124 #125  @pietbrauer 
- Add swiftformat
  #130 @pietbrauer 

Thanks to everyone for making this huge release possible by creating and reviewing PRs and Issues! ❤️

## Changes

- Replace query param auth with authorization header auth      
    #104 @joshdholtz
- Fix capitalization in `enum Openness`      
    #106  @MaxDesiatov 
- Add base and head branch refs to PullRequest model     
    #109 @kolyasev 
- Add support for Commit Statuses     
    #110 @kolyasev 
- Add missing properties of User     
    #114 @mvolpato 
- Fetch issue comments     
    #115 @mvolpato 
- Implement the API endpoint for listing releases     
    #116 @417-72KI 
- Fix tests and decoding issues     
    #121 @dato @pietbrauer 

## Tests
- Test with Linux Swift 5.2 on Travis      
    #108 @MaxDesiatov 
- Fix `swift test` invocations on macOS      
    #107 @MaxDesiatov 
- GitHub actions     
    #120 @pietbrauer 
- Fix tests and decoding issues     
    #121 @dato @pietbrauer 

## Docs
- Make examples in README.md consistent      
    #105 @MaxDesiatov 
- Use label 'name' in sample calls to user() in README.md     
    #118 @dato 

Thanks to everyone for making this huge release possible by creating and reviewing PRs and Issues! ❤️

* SwiftPM Changes 5.2. #102 #103   
   @bofeizhu @f-meloni @pietbrauer
name: SwiftPM 5.2
OMG It's been so long

body:
* Make Framework Linux compatible   
   #69 @f-meloni
* Support for Swift PM
   #68 @shkhaliq
name: It's Linux not Linux

body:
* Update to Swift 4    
   #66 @pietbrauer

* Add basic PullRequest Support  
  #62 @polok
* New binary with Swift 3.1 compatibility

- Replace naive parameter parsing for redirect URLs  
  #59 @pietbrauer
- Update to recommended project settings  
  #58 #60 @russellbstephens @pietbrauer

- Cherry pick bug fixes from Swift 2.3 branch  
  #57 @pietbrauer
- Fixes a critical bug where repos would not be loaded
name: Bug fixes and performance improvements

body: _Intended to be used with Xcode 8.0 and Swift 3.0_
name: Let there be Swift 3

body: _Intended to be used with Xcode 7.3.1 or Xcode 8.0 and Swift 2.2 or 2.3_
name: Swift 2.2/2.3

body:
- Add `allow_signup=false` to the authenticate URL so the signup button is hidden on iPads (makes apps not being rejected)  
  #42 @pietbrauer
name: AppStore compliant

body:
- Update Xcode to 7.3  
  #39 @pietbrauer
name: Xcode 7.3

body:
- Add support for all platforms: Mac OS X, tvOS and watchOS  
  #8 @pietbrauer
name: All the Platforms

body:
- Update RequestKit  
  #30 @pietbrauer

- Add `lastPush` and `htmlURL` to `Repositories`  
  #22 @phatblat 
- Load repositories for arbitrary user  
  #21 @phatblat 
- Add podspec  
  #26 @nwest 
- Remove routers from public API  
  #28 @nwest 
- Documentation for public API  
  #27 @nwest 

_Note: This release was altered on Dec 11, 2015 to include .bcsymbolmap needed to submit builds to the AppStore with Bitcode enabled_

- Move generic components to [RequestKit](https://github.com/nerdishbynature/requestkit) so [TrashCanKit](https://github.com/nerdishbynature/TrashCanKit) can use it as well #14 
- Add support for fetching starred repositories #17
name: All I see is stars and swirls

body: - Add possibility to get the authentication URL, e.g. for presenting your own `SFSafariViewController` because Apple doesn't know the concept of OAuth. (I am sorry if you are working there and I stepped on your toe, I am sure there is some reason to do it like that)
name: Gimme that URL

body: - Add Objective-C compatibility again
- Add support for Xcode 7 and Swift 2 #11
name: Xcode 7 & Swift 2

body: - Add additional `perPage` parameter to get repositories (defaults to `100`)
- Add `pagination` for repositories list
- Add possibility to post a Public Key #8
name: Post Public Key

body: - Use class for `Repository` and `User` for `objc`-compability
name: Classes are the new structs

body:
- Remove Alamofire dependency #5 
- Solidify JSON Parsing #6 
- Add Carthage support #7
name: Restart all the things
